sourceRef.citation: Kourovka Notebook, Problem 15.14 (Khukhro & Mazurov eds., ed.15)

statement.latex: Do there exist finitely generated branch groups (see 15.12) a) that are non-amenable? c) that contain$F_2$? d) that have exponential growth? { L.\,Bartholdi, R.\,I.\,Grigorchuk, Z.\,{ S}uni\'k} a), c), d) Such groups do exist (S.\,Sidki, J.\,S.\,Wilson, Arch. Math., { 80}, no.\,5 (2003), 458--463).

reiAssessment.solveRationale: Group theory IV_PROBLEM_UNDEFINED; Rei not specialized in group theory (yet)
reiAssessment.formalizationNotes: Kourovka problems are typically research-level group theory
